name: Anastasia Melnichenko
message:
I found your moderating to be great:
Your time management was very smooth.
You transitioned from one speaker to another naturally without having to interrupt them.
You made sure everyone had a chance to share their opinion, inviting quieter participants into the conversation.
Your input was constructive and focused on positive aspects without minimising the difficulties.
I genuinely enjoyed the experience.
Thanks for orchestrating it.

name: Jaz Gill
message: You did a great job as a moderator! My personal take was that you set a very inclusive atmosphere, everyone got comfortable speaking and sharing their opinions. That was definitely my biggest highlight.

name: Morgan Pottruff
message: Hey Darpan, this stuff is absolute gold, man! Thank you.

name: Vilakshan Khanna
message:
I think this will help me a lot.
Thanks for sharing this.
I read it, and it was so thorough!

name: Ashley Alexander
title: Co-Founder
message: Darpan, Wow! Thank you for taking the time to read through and provide that feedback. I really appreciate it.

name: Rob Walker
message:
It's been awesome working with you.

You have a great ability to understand some of the fairly complex ecosystems and projects that we've undertaken, allowing you to support and manage those projects.

You've been extremely fun and pleasant to work with and have always done a great job protecting the time of team members.

name: Jean-Sébastien Côté
message: Darpan has been an excellent and extremely efficient team lead for the Optimization squad. He clearly knows how to motivate and get the best out of team members, puts in very apparent care and attention into the work, and consistently provides valuable insights and ideas.

name: Ken Li
message: Darpan is a very capable Product Manager with great mix of project management and product management skills. He embodies a calm demeanor at all times and able to communicate very clearly so that the team understands their goals and objectives for success. Darpan's role is critical to the smooth planning and execution of our product priorities, acting as the glue between the cross functional departments. Definitely a highly valued employee and a team leader.

name: Jay Mukherjee
message: Darpan was engaged as the lead Business Analyst for a major ERP rollout project. I found Darpan as one of my best project team member, experienced, technically sound with an eye for detail. Darpan has the ability to build collaborative relationships with his team members and contribute well to enhance the team work. I will highly recommend Darpan for his professionalism and diligence.

name: Misha Gupta
message: Darpan leads the cross-functional team with great focus. We worked together for 2 years at FutureVault. Darpan communicates with the local and international team effectively to get things done. His friendly yet firm approach to handling conflicts in the group is worth mentioning. I will recommend Darpan for his technical and leadership skills.

name: Dhillon Singh
message: Darpan has the ability to build collaboration with his team members and contribute well to enhance the team work. I worked with Darpan on large client implementations at Stellar. I found Darpan to be a great asset to the project team, experienced, technically sound with an eye for detail. I will highly recommend Darpan for his professionalism and diligence.

name: Tennille Moisel
title: General Manager
message: You consistently go above and beyond. Thanks Darpan

name: Farid Jarrar
title: Chief Information Officer
message: I would also like to acknowledge Darpan for his commitment, dedication and hard work. You have certainly gone the extra mile and I would like to acknowledge your significant contribution.

name: Scott Walsh
title: General Manager
message: Darpan, Thank you for your hard work and dedication, it is a pleasure having you as a part of the team. Keep up the great work.
